trigger: Student opens a lesson and asks for an actionable study session.
success_criteria: Student completes a full study cycle in one flow and uses at least two generated assets in the same session.
result: Student receives one consolidated practice package for today instead of separate tools.
steps: Ingest lesson content from LMS, Drive, or pasted notes.
Generate a bundled micro-session with flashcards, quiz, adaptive hints, and summary.
Prioritize practice items based on weak areas and available time.
Run a quick self-check and recommend immediate next action.
Save session output for same-day revision.

trigger: Student is within 1-2 weeks of an exam and needs a realistic revision path.
use_case: Exam sprint planner and revision tracker
success_criteria: Student keeps plan adherence above 80 percent and sees all critical topics scheduled before exam day.
result: Student gets a dynamic revision plan that updates with progress and constraints.
steps: Build an exam countdown plan from syllabus scope and available hours.
Generate revision checklist and prerequisite gap alerts.
Rebalance daily sessions when deadlines or workload change.
Track completed revision blocks and unresolved gaps.
Surface the highest-impact next session automatically.

trigger: Student is selecting courses and wants schedule fit plus opportunity guidance.
success_criteria: Student can choose a course path in one session without needing multiple disconnected checks.
result: Student receives one decision package for enrollment, support options, and scheduling.
steps: Analyze transcript signals and prerequisite readiness.
Check candidate courses and timing conflicts.
Evaluate scholarship or support eligibility where relevant.
Recommend aligned campus opportunities and study resources.
Publish a ranked plan with rationale and next actions.

trigger: Student starts an assignment and needs help from understanding to final submission quality check.
success_criteria: Student reaches submission-ready state in one flow with no missing required sections.
result: Student completes assignment work through a single guided workflow.
steps: Extract assignment intent, milestones, and due-date constraints.
Generate structured draft aids including summaries and key points.
Offer hint progression for blocked problem-solving steps.
Check completeness against rubric-style criteria before submission.
Produce final submission checklist with time-to-submit warning.

trigger: Teacher prepares upcoming lesson blocks and classroom activities.
success_criteria: Teacher can run the full class session using one generated plan without manual restructuring.
result: Teacher gets one consolidated teaching plan for preparation and delivery.
steps: Import lesson scope and learning objectives.
Generate activity sequence, discussion prompts, and timing plan.
Map activities to class constraints and engagement goals.
Prepare reusable delivery notes for in-class execution.
Output session plan for immediate classroom use.

trigger: Teacher finishes assessment review and needs aligned student feedback plus family updates.
success_criteria: Teacher publishes rubric feedback and family updates with minimal edits in the same workflow run.
result: Teacher completes grading-to-parent communication in one connected workflow.
steps: Generate rubric-aligned feedback for each student submission.
Summarize actionable strengths, gaps, and next steps.
Draft parent communication with tone and clarity controls.
Translate communication where multilingual delivery is needed.
Finalize and send with traceable feedback context.

trigger: Teacher needs to ensure lesson plans are inclusive and standards-aligned before delivery.
use_case: Inclusive instruction and standards compliance builder
success_criteria: Lesson package passes standards and accessibility checks before classroom delivery.
result: Teacher gets one standards-and-accommodations validated lesson package.
steps: Check lesson artifacts against standards expectations.
Generate accommodation suggestions for diverse learner needs.
Flag compliance risks and required instructional adjustments.
Produce revised lesson variant with accessibility considerations.
Output compliance-ready teaching package.

trigger: Admin receives policy questions or needs to publish high-clarity institutional communication.
success_criteria: Policy response and announcement drafts are approved in one pass with valid citations.
result: Admin resolves policy Q and communication needs in one auditable workflow.
steps: Retrieve relevant policy sources and generate citation-backed answers.
Draft operational announcements with clarity scoring.
Validate wording for compliance and audience fit.
Attach source references for audit traceability.
Publish approved responses and communications.

trigger: Admin runs weekly student success review to identify and act on risk signals.
use_case: Student success risk and intervention command center
success_criteria: High-risk students receive assigned interventions within the target service window.
result: Admin executes the full detect-to-intervene loop in one dashboard workflow.
steps: Aggregate attendance, performance, and intervention history signals.
Generate tiered risk segmentation and priority interventions.
Assign owners and follow-up actions by severity.
Track intervention completion and status updates.
Produce leadership-ready risk summary with next-cycle actions.

trigger: Admin monitors enrollment health and resource utilization to plan retention actions.
use_case: Enrollment, retention, and resource operations desk
success_criteria: Operations team receives one weekly prioritized plan with measurable follow-up actions.
result: Admin gets a consolidated operations plan for enrollment, retention, and resources.
steps: Sync SIS enrollment and progression snapshots.
Analyze resource utilization and bottleneck signals.
Generate retention action plan for at-risk cohorts.
Prioritize operational actions by expected impact.
Publish weekly operations brief for execution teams.
